title: trifolium longipes var. atrorubens
intro: Trifolium longipes var. atrorubens, also known as purple clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family and is native to western North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Purple clover is rich in isoflavones, which have been linked to various health benefits, including reducing the risk of heart disease and menopausal symptoms. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
